title: Funding Readiness Scorecard for Brokers
meta_description: Use the Funding Readiness Scorecard to triage borrower readiness, collect cleaner intake, and recommend next steps before a human review.

hero.headline: Turn cold funding inquiries into cleaner readiness conversations.
hero.body: Give prospects a structured scorecard before the first call so you can see potential funding paths, document gaps, and review priority without exposing internal provider logic.

sections.heading: What it does not do
items: It does not expose provider routing.
It does not replace human review.
It does not promise rates or funding outcomes.

sections.heading: Recommended next step
sections.body: Embed the public scorecard, route submissions into a review queue, and keep internal matching logic server-side.

guardrails: Do not expose providers, affiliate links, apply links, commissions, private contacts, routing logic, underwriting notes, credentials, or real borrower PII.
Do not imply approval, final eligibility, best rates, or instant funding.
Link CTAs to public-safe internal routes only.
